_publications._publicationTitle: Nf1-dependent tumors require a microenvironment containing Nf1+/-- and c-kit-dependent bone marrow.

_contextSnippet: From this population, the majority of cells were identified as mast cells (CD117+; FcεRI+;EGFP+, Figure 3E, panel 3)
details: Successfully used in combination with CD117 to identify mast cells as the predominant hematopoietic cell type in neurofibromas
